name: Reidar
title: Software builder and operator
bio: I build and operate web products, technical tools, and infrastructure with clear evidence and honest limits. I like systems that work without babysitting.
whatIDo: Build full-stack products with Next.js, TypeScript, and operationally useful interfaces
Create technical tools for transport, aviation, DeFi, and infrastructure workflows
Turn live data into clear decisions with provenance, freshness, and explicit limitations
Harden deployment, monitoring, and automation paths so claims can be verified
